DEC-WS-001 (one SQLite file per workspace) — clear() operates per-workspace, no shared discriminator added
DEC-WS-006 (_ensure_active at top of public data methods) — clear(name=None) honours; clear(name='missing') raises ValueError matching delete() semantics
F62/F64 (mode.run_fail + panel separation) — not touched; this slice has no error-panel rendering
Sacred Practice 5 (loud failures) — DEC-WORKSPACE-DB-007 post-clear RuntimeError on partial clear
Sacred Practice 12 (single authority per state domain) — DEC-WORKSPACE-DB-001 (clear semantics in manager only) + DEC-WORKSPACE-DB-005 (single _render_db_status_table)
Phase 17O contract preserved — error_interpreter.py + error_handler.py + agent/tools.py BYTEWISE UNCHANGED (DEC-ERROR-INTERPRETER-001..008 + DEC-ERROR-ROUTING-001..007)

src/adversary_pursuit/core/console.py — do_workspace dispatcher gains 'clear' arm; _workspace_clear / _humanise_bytes / _render_db_status_table NEW helpers; do_db_status body delegates to render helper (signature + docstring preserved)

tests/test_chat_workspace_parity.py — NEW, 10 tests covering chat workspace parity + chat db_status

forbidden_shortcuts: no schema change (no new column, no new table, no new index, no Alembic migration)
no edit of any file under src/adversary_pursuit/dossier/
no edit of any file under src/adversary_pursuit/gamification/
no edit of src/adversary_pursuit/agent/tools.py (LLM tool count stays at 30)
no edit of src/adversary_pursuit/agent/error_handler.py or src/adversary_pursuit/core/error_interpreter.py (Phase 17O contract preserved)
no pyproject.toml / uv.lock change (Python stdlib only — no new dependency)
no pre-staged MASTER_PLAN.md commit; Phase 17P amendment lands in SAME implementer commit as source (AP #74 pattern)
no silent partial clear — DEC-WORKSPACE-DB-007 post-clear verification is mandatory
no confirm_token parameter on WorkspaceManager.clear() — DEC-WORKSPACE-DB-001 puts confirmation at UI surface only
no hard break of legacy chat 'workspace <name>' shorthand — DEC-WORKSPACE-DB-003 deprecate-and-warn path is mandatory
no summarised chat db_status variant — DEC-WORKSPACE-DB-005 single render helper across both surfaces is mandatory
no new LLM tool exposing clear (agent must not have unconfirmed wipe capability)
rollback_boundary: Single-commit git revert <impl-sha> restores pre-slice state byte-for-byte. WorkspaceManager.clear() + 3 status helpers vanish (28 new tests vanish). cmd2 workspace clear vanishes. Chat workspace parser returns to single-arg-switch (legacy bug returns). Chat db_status meta-command vanishes. do_db_status returns to 4-row anemic table. MASTER_PLAN.md Phase 17P section + Plan Status row vanish; Active Phase Pointer reverts to Phase 17O closeout state. No schema migration to undo, no external file to clean up, no env var to remove, no dependency to uninstall.
acceptance_notes: Phase 17P closes two user-visible UX gaps surfaced post-17O: (1) chat workspace command parity with cmd2 + new clear subcommand on both surfaces; (2) enhanced do_db_status + new chat db_status meta-command. NO schema change, NO dossier/gamification touch, NO runner.py touch, NO new LLM tool. All confirmations live at UI surfaces (DEC-WORKSPACE-DB-001); legacy chat shorthand is deprecate-and-warn for one cycle (DEC-WORKSPACE-DB-003); single render helper across both surfaces (DEC-WORKSPACE-DB-005); post-clear loud-fail verification (DEC-WORKSPACE-DB-007). Sentinel-row clearing as documented side effect (DEC-WORKSPACE-DB-002).
ready_for_guardian_definition: All 28 new tests green; full suite green at >= pre-slice baseline + 28; all 15 real-path checks succeed; every MUST-non-empty diff non-empty and every MUST-empty diff empty; SHA-256 of models/database.py and agent/runner.py equals pre-slice values (BYTEWISE UNCHANGED proof); MASTER_PLAN.md Phase 17P closeout section + Plan Status row + Active Phase Pointer re-point all present in the single implementer commit (SAME commit per AP #74); implementer commit message starts with feat(workspace): and references DEC-WORKSPACE-DB-001..007 + Phase 17P; tmp/workspace-db-scope.json registered via cc-policy workflow scope-sync at provisioning and byte-identical at landing; tmp/workspace-db-evaluation.json registered via cc-policy workflow work-item-set; reviewer emits REVIEW_VERDICT=ready_for_guardian at implementer head SHA.
